texts.Abp.CachingManagement:01001: A cache of Type {Type} does not support viewing key values.
texts.MultipleCacheWillBeDeletedMessage: The selected cache will be deleted. Deleting the cache may have an impact on the system. Please proceed with caution!
texts.EditCacheValueAlertMessage: Modifying the cache directly may affect the system operation. Please proceed with caution!
